outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to positive total GEX (0.64B). Dealer hedging will dampen movements within 570-600 range. Negative GEX in weekly/monthly suggests volatility expansion if spot breaks structural boundaries.
outlook.summary: Spot (584.31) pinned between Weekly Max Pain (584) and 0DTE Gamma Flip (583.22). Positive total GEX creates a magnetic consolidation zone. Call walls at 590/600 contain upside; Put walls at 570/560 provide structural support. Bearish skew in weekly/monthly (1.25-1.28) indicates hedging pressure. Volume-based PCR 1.97 suggests short-term put heavy flow but likely delta hedging. Range-bound price action expected until catalyst breaks 570-600 channel.

levels.motivazione: Dominant Call OI confluence across all expiries (35.6k 0DTE, 5.3k WEEKLY, 39.8k MONTHLY). High IV 0.2793. Major resistance zone where dealers short calls will defend. Max structural resistance.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point just below spot (584.31). Critical inflection where dealer delta hedging flips direction. Near Weekly Max Pain (584) creates magnetic zone.
Major Put OI confluence (13.9k 0DTE, 3.6k WEEKLY, 39.3k MONTHLY). High IV 0.3501. Near 0DTE Max Pain (571). Strong institutional support zone.
Significant Call structure (9.2k 0DTE, 5.0k WEEKLY, 15.3k MONTHLY). Balanced with Put OI in monthly. First resistance above spot for upside tests.
Massive 0DTE Put volume (192,778) indicates heavy hedging. Put OI 6.8k WEEKLY, 31k MONTHLY. Near-term support with dealer gamma support.
Weekly Max Pain aligned with current spot (584.31). Price attraction point where option value minimized. Natural target for MM pinning behavior.
Major Put OI across expiries (14k 0DTE, 4.3k WEEKLY, 31.2k MONTHLY). Deep structural floor. Last line of defense before breakdown scenario.
Call OI 9.8k 0DTE with high volume (58.8k). Put OI 13.3k MONTHLY. Just above spot creates friction for upside moves. Mixed structure.
Put OI 7.9k 0DTE with very high volume (59.5k). Put OI 3.4k WEEKLY. Secondary support between 580 and 570 walls.
